query:
SELECT 
  MONTH(data_referencia) as mes, 
  YEAR(data_referencia) as ano, 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  data_referencia
FROM demonstrativo 
WHERE estabelecimentoId = 1
GROUP BY data_referencia, MONTH(data_referencia), YEAR(data_referencia)
ORDER BY data_referencia DESC
LIMIT 10;
